summary: Added per-chapter record lenses to the Chapter Archive so selected chapter dossiers can be narrowed by all, proof, unlock, service, task, trace, and gate records with counts, disabled empty lenses, per-lens reveal state, and Event Proof plus Route Replay synchronization.

queries: filter chips UX pattern selected state counts disabled empty filters
faceted filtering event log timeline drilldown UX
activity feed grouped events detail filters design pattern
pattern_notes: Filter chips should expose selected state, concise labels, and immediate scannable choices near the content they refine.
Faceted filtering helps long histories stay navigable by letting operators narrow records through meaningful categories instead of searching manually.
Log and feed drilldowns benefit from a stable master-detail path: select a chapter, filter the record class, then jump to the exact proof or replay stage.

ui_contract: Render seven selected-chapter lenses inside the Chapter Archive record deck: All, Proof, Unlock, Service, Task, Trace, and Gate.
Show per-lens counts, keep zero-count lenses visible but disabled, and mark the active lens through button state and aria-pressed.
Keep reveal-more state scoped by lane, chapter, and active lens so changing filters starts from a compact four-record view.
When a lens selects a different first record, synchronize Event Proof and Route Replay through the existing focused-event contract.
Preserve responsive wrapping for narrow and wide layouts without horizontal overflow or clipped chip text.

baseline.evidence: Pre-implementation code search found no path-chapter-record-lenses markup, data-path-chapter-lens controls, or pathChapterRecordLens browser state.

green_route.evidence: Rendered seven chapter lenses with All active, counts All 43, Proof 22, Unlock 21, and Service/Task/Trace/Gate disabled at 0; header read 'Chapter Records 06/15 dossier 4 / 43' with four visible records.

lens_filtering.evidence: Selecting Proof changed the deck to 4 / 22 proof records, focused 'Digital products local gated hold register', moved Event Proof to 2 / 64, and synced Route Replay to Stage 63 of 64. Reveal expanded Proof to 8 / 22. Selecting Unlock changed the deck to 4 / 21 outcome records and synced Route Replay to Stage 64 of 64.

older_chapter_lens.evidence: Selecting the 06/14 chapter showed counts All 21, Unlock 10, Service 6, Trace 5, with Proof/Task/Gate disabled. Selecting Service rendered 4 / 6 service records, focused 'Legal Kyc Tax Payment', moved Event Proof to 53 / 64, synced Route Replay to Stage 12 of 64, and kept Event Stream at 64 of 64 visible.

responsive.evidence: All tested viewports rendered seven lenses, All active with aria-pressed true, four visible chapter records, no bad rectangles, no clipped chapter lens or record text, and document width equal to client width.
